runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (29.91) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 5 lengths. Super consistent from the draw with a win and two places from three starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

runners.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when sixth (21.37) at this track. Makes plenty of appeal on best and can easily atone here.

Came together in the turn out of the back straight and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 365m at this track behind Goodbye Mate beaten 6 lengths (21.05). Around the mark recently. Among the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 365m at this track behind Goodbye Mate beaten 6 lengths (21.05). Around the mark recently. Among the leading chances.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a one length third over 365m at this track, clocking 20.90. Thereabouts of late and can feature with the right run.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Paw Zeva beaten 5.5 lengths (19.54). Has a fast 20.7 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.
